name: iccv-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ICCV, the biennial IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision: odd-year cycle planning, the early-March single submission deadline, every-author reviewer duty, the May rebuttal week, CVF open access + IEEE Xplore publication, and the CVPR/ICCV/ECCV retargeting triangle. Grounded in ICCV 2025 (Honolulu) official pages checked on 2026-07-08.
